name: Hume AI
description: Connect agents to Hume AI for empathic voice (EVI), expression measurement, and text-to-speech

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Hume API key (sent as X-Hume-Api-Key header)

fields.label: Secret Key
fields.description: Client secret for OAuth2 token-based access (optional, used for server-to-server auth)

enableEVI.description: Enable Empathic Voice Interface (EVI) for emotion-aware voice conversations

enableExpressionMeasurement.description: Enable expression measurement for facial/vocal/language emotion analysis

eviConfigId.description: EVI configuration ID for a pre-configured voice persona

ttsVoice.description: TTS voice name or custom voice ID
